title: Hakeem Jeffries: Abortion rights are 'about freedom' in 2024 elections
shortDescription: House Democratic leader Hakeem Jeffries said abortion rights will 'be an incredibly' significant issue in the upcoming elections.

title: Trump hush money trial: Former aide Hope Hicks called to stand
shortDescription: Follow live updates as Donald Trump's former White House communications director Hope Hicks is set to testify and we could get a gag order ruling.

title: Ex-Wisconsin election worker fined for ordering military ballots with fake names
shortDescription: The charges against Kimberly Zapata came at a sensitive time for election workers after Donald Trump sought to sow doubt in election processes.

title: Who is the ultra-wealthy donor giving huge sums to both RFK Jr. and Trump?
shortDescription: Over nine months, Mellon gave $5 million donations that alternate between super PACs supporting Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Donald Trump.

title: Whom will Trump choose as his running mate? Contenders gather in Fla.
shortDescription: At least six contenders for Trump's running mate will attend a Republican donor retreat that looks in part like an audition to join the ticket.

title: GOP senators question FSA chief in meeting after news he'll step down
shortDescription: The meeting happened nearly a week after the Education Department said Richard Cordray will step down later this summer.

title: Do you accept this election?
shortDescription: Donald Trump implied he might refuse to concede if he lost the upcoming presidential election. It's Thursday's news.

title: 'What have we done?' Stormy Daniels' lawyer on election night, 2016
shortDescription: In former president Donald Trump's historic hush money trial, a lawyer who represented Karen McDougal and Stormy Daniels testified about the election.

title: OnPolitics: Biden addresses campus protests
shortDescription: Joe Biden condemned violence, destruction and antisemitism on college campuses while defending the right for pro-Palestinian protesters to peacefully demonstrate.

title: Almost 300 ex-Obama-Biden staffers call for suspending aid to Israel
shortDescription: The group is also asking Biden to call for an immediate cease-fire in Gaza, withdrawal of troops from Gaza and the West Bank.

title: Trump is in Wisconsin. Here's why that's important
shortDescription: It's not the cheese, brats or beer that's bringing the former president to the Badger State - a look as to why WI is critical in the 2024 elections

title: Biden pledges to accept election results, after Trump wouldn't commit
shortDescription: White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre made the election pledge after Trump in Wisconsin placed conditions on accepting the results.

title: 'Watch them like hawks': Trump asks backers to become election workers
shortDescription: Trump's remarks on Wednesday follow his pattern of false claims around the 2020 election and efforts to sow doubt in election integrity.

title: MTG votes against Antisemitism Awareness Act. Why?
shortDescription: MTG voted against the Antisemitism Awareness act, and cited an age-old trope in doing so.
